headline: Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Biotech company Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 1.9% year on year to $2.48 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.57 per share was 20.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
